# Volkswagen MQB Marketplace

A dedicated online marketplace focused on the Volkswagen MQB (Modularer Querbaukasten) platform — one of VW Group's most widely used modular architectures, shared across brands like VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT. The platform serves automotive enthusiasts and owners looking to buy, sell, or trade parts, upgrades, and accessories specifically compatible with MQB-based vehicles, creating a niche community-driven hub for this popular platform.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Unleash MQB Performance Parts — Volkswagen MQB Marketplace

URL: https://example.com
Description: Discover elite aftermarket automotive parts for your VW, Audi, Skoda, or SEAT MQB build. Join the ultimate niche hub to buy, sell, and trade performance upgrades today.

## Built for the MQB Platform


The definitive marketplace for Volkswagen Group enthusiasts. Find, buy, and sell with total confidence across the most versatile modular architecture in the automotive world.











### MQB-Only Compatibility


Every part listed is verified for the Volkswagen MQB platform. No more guessing games or cross-referencing part numbers — just pure, guaranteed fitment for your Mk7, Mk8, or equivalent MQB-based vehicle.












### Community-Driven Marketplace


Join a passionate network of MQB builders, tuners, and daily drivers. Our marketplace is fueled by enthusiasts who understand the platform inside and out — whether you're hunting for rare OEM+ parts or selling your take-off performance upgrades.












### Cross-Brand Relevance


The MQB architecture spans Volkswagen, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT. One platform, endless possibilities. Browse parts that seamlessly interchange across the entire VW Group family, from the practical Skoda Octavia to the premium Audi A3.


















## THE MQB ECOSYSTEM BY THE NUMBERS


From shared platform architecture to a thriving enthusiast community, the MQB platform connects performance-driven drivers across Volkswagen, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT. Explore the scale of compatibility and the passion behind every part.









40+
Million


### Vehicles on MQB Platform


Over 40 million vehicles built on the Modularer Querbaukasten architecture since 2012, making it one of the most prolific platforms in automotive history.






4
Brands


### Core Brand Family


Volkswagen, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT share deep parts interchangeability, unlocking a massive cross-brand catalog of performance automotive parts and accessories.






15K+
Listings


### Active Community Listings


A curated marketplace of over 15,000 enthusiast-sourced parts, from OEM retrofits to high-performance upgrades for Mk7 and Mk8 Golf platforms.






98%
Fitment


### Compatibility Confidence


With detailed part numbers and platform-specific filtering, we ensure near-perfect fitment rates for aftermarket automotive parts across the MQB lineup.



















## The MQB Vision


A curated look into the enthusiast world our marketplace serves. From OEM+ builds and performance upgrades to DIY garage installs, explore the shared visual language of MQB-based ownership across VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT.

## Master Your MQB Build Guide — Volkswagen MQB Marketplace

URL: https://example.com/platform-guide
Description: Dive into the definitive MQB platform guide covering compatibility, generations, and modular secrets across VW Group brands. Unlock smarter aftermarket performance auto parts choices now.

Master Your MQB Build Guide — Volkswagen MQB Marketplace













































Skip to main content

















- Products Products




- Home
- Platform Guide
- Community
- Contact
0

















# What is the MQB Platform?



The Modularer Querbaukasten (MQB) is Volkswagen Group's revolutionary modular architecture, underpinning millions of vehicles across VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT. This shared engineering DNA means that a vast ecosystem of aftermarket automotive parts is cross-compatible, making it easier than ever to find performance automotive parts, upgrades, and accessories that fit perfectly. Whether you're building a Mk7 Golf or an Audi A3, the MQB platform creates a powerful community of shared fitment and endless customization potential.





### Cross-Brand Compatibility


Parts designed for MQB vehicles often fit across multiple brands. A suspension upgrade for a VW Golf may bolt directly onto a Skoda Octavia or SEAT Leon, dramatically expanding your options for automotive exterior parts and performance enhancements.




### Unified Engineering Standards


MQB standardizes engine mounting points, suspension geometries, and electronic architectures. This consistency ensures that aftermarket performance auto parts integrate seamlessly, reducing guesswork and installation headaches for enthusiasts and professionals alike.




### Thriving Aftermarket Ecosystem


The sheer volume of MQB-based vehicles on the road has fueled a massive community of tuners, fabricators, and parts manufacturers. From aero kits for the Mk8 Golf to engine management solutions for the Audi S3, the MQB marketplace is the central hub for every enthusiast.


















## The MQB Architecture


Understanding the modular logic that connects VW, Audi, Skoda & SEAT — and why fitment precision still matters for your build.










### Shared Chassis Logic


The MQB platform standardises the front bulkhead, pedal box, and engine mounting points. This shared DNA means suspension components, subframes, and bracing often interchange across brands — but wheelbase and track width variations demand careful cross-referencing.











### Drivetrain & Suspension


From the EA888 engine family to MacPherson strut and multi-link rear setups, the MQB matrix supports a wide performance spectrum. Aftermarket performance automotive parts like coilovers, sway bars, and brake kits often span multiple models — but always verify axle load ratings and damper tuning.











### Trim-Level Variability


A single MQB model can span base hatchback to high-output AWD estate. Bumper covers, grilles, lighting, and interior switchgear differ by trim and region. Our marketplace categorises by PR codes and part numbers so you get the right automotive exterior parts first time.











### Exact Vehicle Identification


Even within a shared platform, model year, engine code, and market-specific equipment create critical fitment boundaries. We encourage sellers to list OEM references and VIN-range notes, ensuring enthusiasts find aftermarket automotive parts that bolt on without compromise.



















Platform Evolution


## The MQB Timeline


Tracing the modular architecture that unified Volkswagen Group's global lineup — from its debut to the current generation — and understanding why the aftermarket automotive parts ecosystem is broader and more interconnected than ever before.





Products













2012

### MQB Debut & The Mk7 Golf


The modular transverse toolkit (MQB) launched with the Audi A3 and Volkswagen Golf Mk7, replacing the PQ35 platform. This revolutionary architecture standardized engine mounting points, electrical architectures, and front-axle geometry across brands, instantly creating a massive shared-parts matrix for Audi, VW, Skoda, and SEAT.




Mk7 Golf · MQB Gen 1







Cross-Brand Expansion · 2013–2016


2013–2016

### Cross-Brand Proliferation


MQB rapidly expanded beyond hatchbacks into sedans, wagons, and SUVs. The Skoda Octavia, SEAT Leon, and Audi TT all adopted the architecture, while the Volkswagen Tiguan and Passat brought MQB into the midsize segment. This proliferation created an enormous ecosystem for performance automotive parts and exterior upgrades that could be shared across dozens of models.







2019–Present

### MQB Evo & The Mk8 Golf


The MQB Evo update brought advanced driver-assistance systems, 48V mild-hybrid electrification, and a fully digital cockpit architecture. The Mk8 Golf, new Audi A3, and Skoda Octavia Mk4 all ride on this refined platform. For enthusiasts, the aftermarket has exploded with automotive exterior parts, digital retrofits, and hybrid-compatible performance upgrades that keep the platform future-proof.




Mk8 Golf R · MQB Evo





















## The MQB Network — One Platform, Four Expressions


Each brand within the Volkswagen Group interprets the shared modular architecture with a distinct philosophy — from design language and trim execution to driving character and enthusiast culture. Explore how aftermarket performance automotive parts unlock unique potential across the family.














### Volkswagen


The heart of the MQB universe. Volkswagen combines precision engineering with accessible performance, making the Golf GTI, Golf R, and Tiguan R the go-to platforms for enthusiasts entering the world of aftermarket automotive parts. The community thrives on OEM+ upgrades and daily-driver refinement.














### Audi


Premium progression meets quattro heritage. Audi's MQB models — from the S3 to the RS Q3 — push the boundaries of luxury and speed. Enthusiasts gravitate toward high-end performance automotive parts, focusing on turbocharger upgrades, suspension refinement, and motorsport-inspired exterior enhancements.














### Škoda


The intelligent enthusiast's choice. Škoda leverages MQB versatility to deliver exceptional space and value in models like the Octavia vRS and Superb. The tuning scene here is deeply practical — prioritizing stealth performance, chassis dynamics, and clever automotive exterior parts that enhance without shouting.














### SEAT / CUPRA


Mediterranean spirit meets motorsport DNA. Born from SEAT's sporty lineage, CUPRA injects MQB with emotional design and dynamic flair. The Formentor and Leon are canvases for bold aftermarket performance auto parts, with a culture that celebrates copper accents, aggressive aero, and spirited driving.
















## MQB Platform Questions


Common questions from the community about modular compatibility, cross-brand parts, and making confident fitment decisions for your Volkswagen MQB vehicle.





### What counts as an MQB platform vehicle?


The Volkswagen Group MQB (Modularer Querbaukasten) platform underpins a vast range of front-engine, transverse-mounted vehicles across VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT. From the Mk7 and Mk8 Golf to the Audi A3 8V and Skoda Octavia, these cars share core architecture, wiring, and mounting points, making a huge catalog of aftermarket automotive parts interchangeable across nameplates.




### Do parts transfer between VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT?


Many performance automotive parts — including suspension components, engine mounts, and interior electronics — are designed for the MQB architecture and can transfer directly between brands. However, exterior trim, lighting, and body panels are often brand-specific. Our marketplace tags each listing with confirmed cross-compatibility, so you can shop automotive exterior parts and performance upgrades with confidence.




### Why do trim level and model year matter so much?


While the MQB platform is modular, Volkswagen introduced rolling changes to CAN-BUS systems, sensor packages, and mounting brackets between model years. A part that fits a 2015 Mk7 Golf may require an adapter harness for a 2019 Mk7.5. We encourage sellers to list exact PR codes and VIN splits, helping you avoid returns and source the right aftermarket performance auto parts the first time.




### When should I seek direct compatibility guidance?


If a listing doesn't explicitly confirm fitment for your specific model, reach out to the seller through our messaging system before purchasing. For complex swaps — such as retrofitting virtual cockpit displays or MIB3 infotainment across MQB generations — we recommend consulting our community forums or contacting a VW-specialist shop. Our goal is to make every transaction as seamless as the MQB platform itself.




Ask a Compatibility Question














The definitive hub for Volkswagen MQB platform enthusiasts. Discover curated parts, in-depth guides, and a passionate community dedicated to performance and precision across VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT.

# Built on a Shared Platform, Driven by a Common Passion


The MQB architecture isn't just a chassis code — it's the DNA that connects millions of VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT vehicles. Our marketplace was born from the realisation that the best aftermarket automotive parts and knowledge don't live in isolated forums or single-marque silos. They thrive in a space where a Mk7 Golf owner's suspension insight can inspire an Audi A3 build, or a Skoda Octavia tuner's intercooler upgrade becomes the missing piece for a SEAT Leon project.





### From Single Garages to a Shared Grid


What started as a handful of enthusiasts trading performance automotive parts in car-park meets has grown into a dedicated ecosystem. Here, every listing carries the weight of real-world testing — not just a part number, but a story of fitment, dyno runs, and road-trip validation across the MQB family.




### Knowledge That Crosses Badges


The modular platform means modular wisdom. A brake upgrade that transforms an Audi S3 is fundamentally the same kit that sharpens a VW Golf R. We don't just facilitate transactions; we preserve the build threads, the torque specs, and the hard-won lessons that turn a collection of automotive exterior parts and performance upgrades into a cohesive, cross-brand tuning culture.
























## What the MQB Community Says


Real feedback from enthusiasts who trust our marketplace for their aftermarket automotive parts.









"Finding performance automotive parts that actually fit my Mk7 Golf used to be a nightmare. The MQB Marketplace changed everything — every listing is guaranteed to be compatible with my platform. It's the only place I trust for my build."




### Marcus V.

Mk7 Golf Owner & DIY Mechanic








"As an Audi S3 tuner, I need a community that understands cross-platform compatibility. The focus on the MQB architecture here is unmatched. I've sourced everything from exterior parts to engine upgrades without a single fitment issue."




### Lena K.

Audi S3 Tuner & Enthusiast








"Selling my Skoda Octavia vRS parts here was so easy. The niche community means serious buyers who know exactly what they want. I connected with enthusiasts across VW, Audi, and SEAT — exactly the kind of cross-brand synergy the MQB platform deserves."




### David R.

Skoda Octavia vRS Owner & Seller














## Built by Enthusiasts, For the Platform


Curated scenes from garages, meetups, mountain drives, and detailed MQB build photography that communicate the culture surrounding the platform.






































## Built for the MQB Community


Our marketplace is more than just parts — it's a commitment to the enthusiasts who live and breathe the Volkswagen Group's most versatile platform.












### Platform Clarity


Every listing is categorized by MQB generation and chassis code. No more guessing if a Mk7 Golf R intercooler fits your Audi S3 — we make compatibility transparent.









### Enthusiast Respect


We're builders and drivers first. Our marketplace is designed by enthusiasts who understand the difference between OEM+, stage 2 daily, and full track builds, ensuring listings meet real-world expectations.









### Honest Fitment Discussion


We encourage detailed fitment notes, offset specs, and required supporting mods. Whether you're looking for automotive exterior parts or a big turbo kit, the details matter.









### Cross-Brand Inclusivity


VW, Audi, SEAT, Škoda — if it rides on MQB, it belongs here. We break down brand silos so you can find the perfect OEM retrofit or aftermarket performance auto parts regardless of the badge on the hood.
















## Join the MQB Enthusiast Network


Whether you're looking to source rare aftermarket automotive parts, share your latest Mk7 Golf or Mk8 Golf build, or connect with fellow Audi, Skoda, and SEAT owners across the modular platform, this is your space. Our community-driven marketplace is built around fitment confidence, performance discovery, and real conversations about the parts that move us. Let's talk about what you're building.

Start a Conversation


















The definitive hub for Volkswagen MQB platform enthusiasts. Discover curated parts, in-depth guides, and a passionate community dedicated to performance and precision across VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT.

# Let's Talk MQB


Whether you're hunting for a rare OEM part, exploring aftermarket performance upgrades, or looking to connect with fellow builders across the VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT family, you've found the right garage. Drop us a line and let's keep the platform moving.








### Fitment & Compatibility


Unsure if that intercooler or intake fits your Mk7 GTI or Octavia vRS? Our team knows MQB geometry inside out.









### Marketplace Partnerships


Are you a shop or fabricator? List your MQB-specific parts and reach a dedicated community of enthusiasts.









### Community & Events


Got a meet, track day, or build showcase? We help amplify MQB culture and connect builders worldwide.





















## Get in Touch


Whether you're looking for aftermarket automotive parts, have questions about MQB compatibility, or want to collaborate with the marketplace community, we're here to help. Send us a message and our team of VW Group enthusiasts will get back to you promptly.

Email Address

### What We Cover


- MQB Platform Compatibility

- Performance Automotive Parts

- Marketplace Collaboration

- Enthusiast Community Questions





### Response Expectations


Our team of VW Group specialists typically responds within 24-48 hours. For urgent aftermarket automotive parts inquiries, please include detailed vehicle specs for faster assistance.














## Connect with the MQB Marketplace


Whether you're looking for rare OEM parts, performance upgrades, or just want to talk shop about the MQB platform, we're here to help. Find the right channel below to ensure your message reaches the correct team.









### General Inquiries


Have a question about fitment, shipping, or our inventory? Reach out to our support team for a quick response.









### Partnerships & Vendors


Interested in selling your aftermarket automotive parts or becoming a featured vendor? Let's discuss collaboration opportunities.









### Enthusiast Community


Join the conversation about Mk7 Golf, Mk8 Golf, and cross-brand MQB builds. Share your ride and connect with fellow enthusiasts.



















## The MQB Network


From Wolfsburg to Los Angeles, our marketplace connects enthusiasts across every region. Find, buy, and sell performance automotive parts with confidence, knowing you're part of a global community built on the world's most versatile modular platform.

## Return Policy

URL: https://example.com/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Volkswagen MQB Marketplace




































































- Products Products




- Home
- Platform Guide
- Community
- Contact
0












Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/9/2026



At Volkswagen MQB Marketplace, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy

































- Products Products




- Home
- Platform Guide
- Community
- Contact
0















# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/9/2026



Volkswagen MQB Marketplace ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Volkswagen MQB Marketplace

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

















The definitive hub for Volkswagen MQB platform enthusiasts. Discover curated parts, in-depth guides, and a passionate community dedicated to performance and precision across VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT.

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

































- Products Products




- Home
- Platform Guide
- Community
- Contact
0















# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 9, 2026



Volkswagen MQB Marketplace is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Volkswagen MQB Marketplace

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

















The definitive hub for Volkswagen MQB platform enthusiasts. Discover curated parts, in-depth guides, and a passionate community dedicated to performance and precision across VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions

































- Products Products




- Home
- Platform Guide
- Community
- Contact
0















# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 9, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Volkswagen MQB Marketplace

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Automotive Parts & Accessories provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Volkswagen MQB Marketplace provides Automotive Parts & Accessories through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Volkswagen MQB Marketplace. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Volkswagen MQB Marketplace

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
